name: ct-league
description: CT league - Revolutionary prediction & fantasy gaming ecosystem

scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && pnpm dev" "cd frontend && pnpm dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter frontend build && pnpm --filter backend build
scripts.contracts:deploy:sepolia: cd contracts && forge script script/Deploy.s.sol --rpc-url base-sepolia --broadcast --verify
scripts.contracts:deploy:local: cd contracts && forge script script/Deploy.s.sol --rpc-url http://localhost:8545 --broadcast
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter frontend lint && pnpm --filter backend lint
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules frontend/node_modules backend/node_modules contracts/out contracts/cache
